data.name: Margret L.
data.quote: I came for the inflammation claims and stayed for the screening. Nobody had ever checked my heart before letting me near cold water.
data.detail: Completed the 8-week protocol; resting heart rate trended down four beats over the program.

data.name: Bjorn S.
data.quote: No chest-beating, no leaderboard. Just a temperature, a timer, and a supervisor watching my response.
data.detail: Endurance runner; HRV trend rose steadily across weeks five through eight.

data.name: Elin T.
data.quote: They told me plainly which weeks my numbers stalled, and why that was fine. It felt like a clinic, not a class.
data.detail: Managing chronic inflammation; perceived recovery score climbed from 5 to 8 over eight weeks.
